div.style: font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; color: #111; padding: 0; margin: 0; page-break-inside: avoid; page-break-after: avoid;

h2.style: margin: 0 0 10px 0; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.4px;

h3.style: margin: 0 0 8px 0; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.2px;

div.h3: Before Bharat Nyaya – ODR Arbitration Platform
div.p: In the Matter of Arbitration

h3.style: margin: 0 0 6px 0; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.2px;

div.p: Whereas disputes and differences have arisen between the Claimant and the Respondent under the Loan Agreement executed between the parties;
And whereas the said Loan Agreement contains an Arbitration Clause providing for resolution of disputes through arbitration;

The Claimant hereby invokes the Arbitration Clause under the provisions of the Arbitration and Conciliation Act, 1996 and initiates arbitration proceedings through Bharat Nyaya – ODR Arbitration Platform in relation to defaults committed under the above-mentioned Loan Account.
The disputes inter alia relate to recovery of outstanding dues, interest, penal charges, costs, and other consequential reliefs.
The Respondent is hereby informed that arbitration proceedings stand commenced from the date of issuance of this Notice.

t.t-value: (o.location_id.name if o.location_id else o.location) or (o.branch_id.name if o.branch_id else o.branch) or (o.borrower_state_id.name if o.borrower_state_id else o.borrower_state) or '—'

div.p: Authorized Signatory
For

div.style: font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; color: #111; padding: 0; margin: 0; page-break-inside: avoid; page-break-after: avoid;

h2.style: margin: 0 0 8px 0; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.2px;

div.p: To,

p.strong: Subject: Reminder for Arbitrator Selection & Participation

div.p: Sir/Madam,
This is a follow-up to our previous Notice No. 1 regarding initiation of arbitration proceedings by .
We note that no response has been received from your end regarding appointment of an Arbitrator.
You are once again requested to scan the QR Code given below to access the Bharat Nyaya – ODR Platform for the following:

ol.li: Selection/confirmation of Sole Arbitrator;
Filing of reply/written response;
Uploading supporting documents;
Participation in the online proceedings.

div.p: You are granted a further period of 3 (three) days from the date of receipt of this notice to select an Arbitrator.
In the event no selection is made within the stipulated time, an Arbitrator shall be automatically appointed through the platform.
Proposed Preliminary Hearing

ul.li: Mode: Online via Bharat Nyaya – ODR Platform

div.style: font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; color: #111; padding: 0; margin: 0; page-break-inside: avoid; page-break-after: avoid;

h2.style: margin: 0 0 8px 0; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.2px;

div.p: To,

p.strong: Subject: Final Opportunity Before Appointment of Arbitrator / Ex-Parte Proceedings

div.p: Sir/Madam,
Reference is invited to earlier notices issued in connection with the above-mentioned arbitration proceedings.
Despite repeated opportunities, no confirmation/selection of Arbitrator has been received from your end.
You are hereby granted a final opportunity to scan the QR Code below and access the Bharat Nyaya – ODR Platform for selection/confirmation of the Sole Arbitrator.

In case no selection is made within the prescribed timeline, the Bharat Nyaya – ODR Platform shall automatically appoint/generate the Arbitrator in accordance with applicable rules and system-generated allocation process.

You are further informed that in the event of non-participation in the proceedings, the learned Arbitrator may proceed ex-parte and pass appropriate orders/award based upon the documents and records available on record.
Hearing Details

ul.li: Mode: Online Hearing through Bharat Nyaya – ODR Platform

t.t-value: o.arbitrator_id.name if o.arbitrator_id else (o.arbitrator_name or 'Learned Sole Arbitrator')

div.style: font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; color: #111; padding: 0; margin: 0; page-break-inside: avoid; page-break-after: avoid;

h2.style: margin: 0 0 10px 0; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.3px;

h3.style: margin: 0 0 8px 0; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.2px;

div.p: Bharat Nyaya – ODR Arbitration Platform

h3.style: margin: 0 0 6px 0; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.2px;

div.p: Present:
Proceedings:

ol.li: Matter called out through Bharat Nyaya – ODR Platform.
Claimant submitted Statement of Claim and supporting documents.
Respondent appeared and sought time for filing response / remained absent despite service of notices.
Matter adjourned for further proceedings.

div.p: Next Date of Hearing
Sd/-

t.t-value: o.arbitrator_id.name if o.arbitrator_id else (o.arbitrator_name or 'Learned Sole Arbitrator')

div.style: font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; color: #111; padding: 0; margin: 0; page-break-inside: avoid; page-break-after: avoid;

h2.style: margin: 0 0 10px 0; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.3px;

h3.style: margin: 0 0 8px 0; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.2px;
margin: 0 0 6px 0; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.2px;

div.p: Proceedings:

ol.li: Respondent filed Written Statement / failed to appear.
Claimant reiterated claims and placed additional documents on record.
Arguments of parties heard.
Matter posted for final arguments/orders.

div.p: Next Date of Hearing
Sd/-

t.t-value: o.arbitrator_id.name if o.arbitrator_id else (o.arbitrator_name or 'Learned Sole Arbitrator')

div.style: font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; color: #111; padding: 0; margin: 0; page-break-inside: avoid; page-break-after: avoid;

h2.style: margin: 0 0 10px 0; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.3px;

h3.style: margin: 0 0 8px 0; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.2px;
margin: 0 0 6px 0; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.2px;

div.p: Proceedings:

ol.li: Final arguments advanced by the Claimant.
Respondent remained absent despite repeated opportunities / arguments concluded.
Matter reserved for passing of Award.

div.p: Sd/-

t.t-value: o.arbitrator_id.name if o.arbitrator_id else (o.arbitrator_name or 'Learned Sole Arbitrator')

div.style: font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; color: #111; padding: 0; margin: 0; page-break-inside: avoid; page-break-after: avoid;

h2.style: margin: 0 0 10px 0; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.3px;

h3.style: margin: 0 0 8px 0; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.2px;
margin: 0 0 6px 0; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.2px;

div.p: Upon consideration of the pleadings, submissions, and documents placed on record, the Tribunal is satisfied that a prima facie case exists in favour of the Claimant.
Accordingly, it is ordered that:

ol.li: The Respondent shall maintain status quo regarding the secured/hypothecated assets;
The Respondent shall not alienate, transfer, or create third-party rights over the secured assets;
The Claimant is permitted to take appropriate protective measures permissible under law.

div.p: This Interim Order shall remain in force till final disposal of the arbitration proceedings.
Sd/-

t.t-value: (o.financed_amount or 0) - (o.current_pos or 0) if o.financed_amount and o.current_pos is not None else 0

div.style: font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; color: #111; padding: 0; margin: 0; page-break-inside: avoid; page-break-after: avoid;

h2.style: margin: 0 0 10px 0; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.3px;

h3.style: margin: 0 0 8px 0; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.2px;

div.p: In the matter of:
Versus

h3.style: margin: 0 0 6px 0; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.2px;

div.p: The Respondent respectfully submits as under:

ol.li: That the Respondent denies the allegations except those specifically admitted herein;
That the alleged outstanding amount is disputed;
That excess interest/penal charges levied are arbitrary and excessive;
That reconciliation of accounts is required.

div.p: The Respondent therefore prays that the claim petition be dismissed and/or modified appropriately.
Respondent / Authorized Representative

div.style: font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; color: #111; padding: 0; margin: 0; page-break-inside: avoid; page-break-after: avoid;

h2.style: margin: 0 0 8px 0; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.2px;

div.p: To,

span.t-esc: (o.location_id.name if o.location_id else o.location) or (o.borrower_state_id.name if o.borrower_state_id else o.borrower_state) or ''

div.p: Sir/Madam,

Arbitration proceedings have been initiated by
against you on account of default in the above-mentioned Loan Account.
Under the Arbitration Clause and applicable legal provisions, both parties are entitled to mutually select a Sole Arbitrator through the Bharat Nyaya – ODR Arbitration Platform.
You are requested to scan the QR Code given below to access the platform for the following:

ol.li: Access the arbitration case details;
View the panel/list of Arbitrators;
Select/confirm any one Arbitrator;
Upload your response and supporting documents.

div.p: You are requested to select/confirm an Arbitrator within 7 (seven) days from the date of receipt of this notice.
In case no selection is made within the stipulated timeline, an Arbitrator shall be automatically appointed through the platform's automated allocation mechanism.
Failure to participate may result in ex-parte proceedings being conducted against you.

span.t-esc: ' / '.join([x for x in [loan.borrower_state_id.name if loan.borrower_state_id else loan.borrower_state, loan.region_id.name if loan.region_id else loan.region] if x]) or '-'
loan.product or (loan.product_class_id.name if loan.product_class_id else loan.product_classification) or '-'

div.p: Dear ,

This communication is issued in relation to the above loan account under the applicable provisions of the Arbitration and Conciliation Act, 1996 and the governing loan and contractual documents. You are hereby called upon to respond within the stipulated period and to participate in the arbitration process.

You may select an arbitrator from the panel list provided below / shared by the case team. Upon such selection, online hearing proceedings will be scheduled, and the selected arbitrator shall conduct the hearing and pass the arbitral award in accordance with law.
In case of non-response or non-participation, further action may be taken as permissible under law, including continuation of ex-parte proceedings.

Regards,
BharatNyay Legal Operations
Scan the QR code with your phone to confirm OTP and submit arbitrator preference.
Notice ref: · Microsite URL:
